title: LastWords
description: All that remains of bygone days lies beyond words.
body:
# ZH
本模组会在玩家或宠物首次被玩家或主人杀死时将其锁一血，赋予其虚弱和缓慢（可配置），并向聊天栏发送苦命鸳鸯文案。
# EN
This mod will lock the health of players or pets at 1 when they'are about to be killed by other players or owners for the first time, then apply slowness and weakness effect (configurable) on them, and lastly send meme texts to the involved players.
___
THIS IS BASICALLY A CHINESE MEME MOD SO IT MAY MAKE YOU CONFUSED.

DEFAULT LANGUAGE FILE IS CHINESE ONLY AS IT IS GENERALLY MEANINGLESS TO TRANSLATE THE MEME.
